problem.statement: SCE needs one canonical engineering project preview and open/import result envelope so IDE and CLI stop inferring readiness from partial engineering commands.
problem.scope: Engineering project preview plus open/import result semantics, excluding scaffold and ownership extension.
problem.symptom: Readiness and next-step meaning still have to be reconstructed from separate engineering commands.

business_rule: adapters do not synthesize readiness truth

hypotheses.statement: A canonical preview/open contract will remove frontend ambiguity without requiring a full engineering subsystem rewrite.

risks.statement: Scaffold and ownership work may broaden this spec again if not kept separate.

decision_execution_path.decision: scaffold and ownership move to the next child spec
preview and open/import share one canonical reason-code vocabulary

triggers: preview contract grows to include scaffold behavior
adapters still need to infer step meaning from command order
actions: attach debug evidence for ambiguous readiness mapping
